records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
INNER JOIN atom AS T2
  ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE
  T1.label = '+' AND T2.element = 'Br'

records.question: Which molecules have a label of - and contain atoms with the element sn?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'sn' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' AND T2.element = 'sn'

records.question: Which molecules have at least one atom with the element exactly equal to 'f' and also have at least one bond?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM atom AS T2 WHERE T2.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T2.element = 'f' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bond AS T3 WHERE T3.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id )

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain atoms with element na and have bonds where bond_type is -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'na' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE T1.label = '+' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM atom AS T2 WHERE T2.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T2.element = 'na' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bond AS T3 WHERE T3.molecule_id = T1.molecule_id AND T3.bond_type = '-' )

records.question: What molecules have a label exactly '-' and contain bonds where the bond type is exactly '-' with atoms whose element is exactly 'f'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id JOIN atom AS T4 ON T3.atom_id = T4.atom_id OR T3.atom_id2 = T4.atom_id WHERE T1.label = '-' AND T2.bond_type = '-' AND T4.element = 'f'

records.question: Which molecules have the label '+' and have at least one atom with the element 'br' and also have at least one bond?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '+' AND atom.element = 'br'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T2.element = 'br'

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain carbon atoms and have bonds where the bond type is exactly #?
